Labels.emptyTasteProfile: Add a few owned watches to build your taste profile.

Advisor.analyzing: Analyzing {ownedCount} owned · {wishlistCount} wishlist · informed by your taste profile.
Advisor.emptyStateHint: Pick an action on the left, or ask anything about your collection — gaps, what to sell, what to buy next.
Advisor.inputPlaceholder: Ask about gaps, alternatives, fit, or budget…

Collection.emptyBody: Add your first piece to start your collection.
Collection.noMatches: No watches match the current filters.

WatchForm.movementHint: Pick one or type a specific calibre.
WatchForm.currencyHint: Applies to purchase price and market value.
WatchForm.reasonPlaceholder: Adds the dress geometry the collection is missing…
WatchForm.showOnPublicProfile: Show this watch on my public profile

Wishlist.prioritizerBody: Let the advisor rank your wishlist by how well each piece fills a gap and fits your budget.

Compare.addWatchesFirst: Add some watches first — or compare an external watch below.
Compare.selectAtLeastTwo: Select at least 2 watches to compare them side by side.
Compare.conclusionHint: Get a recommendation that weighs these against the watches you already own.
Compare.pasteListingUrl: Paste a listing URL — AI fills the specs
Compare.fillManuallyHint: Or fill the fields manually below. Imported specs are always editable.
Compare.couldntImportBlocked: This site blocks automatic reading. Try another link or add the watch in your collection first.
Compare.importedNotice: Imported — review the fields below, then add to the comparison.
Compare.pickOccasionTag: Pick at least one occasion tag.

ComparePage.title: Compare watches
ComparePage.subtitle: Pick 2–4 watches — yours or an external one. Specs are scored against the pieces you already own.

CollectionDetail.privateInformationHint: Only visible to you. Serial numbers are never shown publicly or exported.
CollectionDetail.deleteConfirmBody: Are you sure you want to remove the {name} from your collection? This can’t be undone.
CollectionDetail.deleteError: Couldn’t delete the watch. Please try again.
CollectionDetail.publicToggleHint: Controls whether this watch appears on your public profile page.
CollectionDetail.aiAnalysisHint: See where this piece sits in your collection — and what it overlaps with.

WearService.daysLogged: {count, plural, one {# day} other {# days}} logged

Document.vaultHint: Warranty cards, receipts, and insurance docs. Never shown publicly or exported to others.
Document.storageNotConfigured: Add your Cloudflare R2 credentials to .env.local to enable document uploads.

CollectionNewPage.title: Add a watch
CollectionNewPage.subtitle: Brand, model, and the mandatory classification power your taste profile and AI advisor.

WishlistNewPage.title: Add to wishlist
WishlistNewPage.subtitle: A wishlist is a purchase strategy, not a loose list — set a time horizon and the reason it earns a place.

WishlistPage.dragHint: Drag pieces between columns as your taste evolves.
WishlistPage.emptyBody: Add a watch you're planning toward, with a time horizon and a reason.

Dashboard.overdueBy: {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}} overdue
Dashboard.inDays: in {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}
Dashboard.emptyBody: Add your first watch to unlock your taste profile and AI advisor.
Dashboard.wellBalanced: Well balanced — no obvious gaps or overlaps.

Onboarding.progress: {done}/{total} — your taste profile and AI advisor come alive with a few watches.
Onboarding.step1Hint: Snap a photo — the AI reads the specs for you.
Onboarding.step2Hint: {current}/{required} added — patterns need a few pieces.
Onboarding.step3HintDone: Your style bars and coverage insights are live below.
Onboarding.step4Hint: One click — the advisor reads your collection's gaps.
Onboarding.addApiKeyHint: Add OPENAI_API_KEY to enable the AI advisor.

Landing.heroSubtitle: Manage your portfolio, prioritize your wishlist, and let AI help you discover the next piece that actually fits your style.
Landing.aiInsightQuote: “Your collection leans sporty and monochrome. A slim dress watch like the <highlight>Cartier Tank</highlight> would add the most versatility.”
Landing.pillar1Body: Specs, story, service history, and private documents — all in one quiet place.
Landing.pillar2Body: Short, mid, long, and grail. AI scores each piece by how well it fits what you already own.
Landing.pillar3Body: Not the internet's opinion. Your collection, your wrist, your style — read by an AI curator.
Landing.pricingSubtitle: Everything you need to understand your collection is free. Unlock the vault when the collection gets serious.
Landing.footerNote: A portfolio project. No real transactions or data shared.

Auth.accountCreated: Account created — you can now sign in.

Settings.subtitle: Decide what the world sees and what stays in the vault.
Settings.makeProfilePublicDesc: Anyone with the link can view your curated collection.
Settings.hideCollectionValueDesc: Don't display the total estimated value of your portfolio.
Settings.hidePurchasePricesDesc: Per-watch prices stay invisible to visitors.
Settings.hideWishlistDesc: Keep your future moves to yourself.
Settings.hideSoldArchiveDesc: Pieces you've parted with won't appear on your profile.
Settings.perWatchControlsDesc: Each watch has its own public/private toggle. Open any watch's page from your <link>collection</link> to set it individually.
Settings.publicProfileThemeDesc: Choose the visual style visitors see on your public profile.
Settings.featuredPieceDesc: Choose which watch leads your public profile. Only your public owned watches can be featured.
Settings.featuredPieceEmpty: Add a public owned watch to choose a featured piece.
Settings.exportDesc: Download a PDF record of your collection for insurance purposes.
Settings.serialNumbersDesc: Never shown publicly, never exported. Visible only to you.
Settings.documentsAndReceiptsDesc: Warranty cards, service receipts, and insurance docs stay in the vault.
Settings.unlockVaultDesc: Document vault, PDF export for insurance, public profile themes, service reminders, market alerts (coming soon), and unlimited AI advisor.

classic.label: Classic
classic.description: Dark gold — the original Wristfolio look.

ProfilePage.subtitle: This is what visitors see when you share your collection.
ProfilePage.anyoneCanView: Anyone with the link can view your public watches.
ProfilePage.turnOnHint: Turn on public profile in settings to share it.
ProfilePage.visibilityNote: Only watches you've marked <public>public</public> appear on your profile. Purchase prices, serial numbers, and documents are never shown. Set each watch's visibility from its detail page.

AddWatchFlow.snapItHint: Up to {max} photos of one watch — dial, caseback, or box. The AI reads the specs; you review before saving.
AddWatchFlow.pasteLinkHint: Paste a product page (bol.com, Amazon, a boutique…). The AI reads the specs and image; you review before saving.
AddWatchFlow.urlWorksBestHint: Works best with product pages. Some sites can't be read automatically — switch to manual entry if nothing comes back.
AddWatchFlow.couldntReadUrl: Couldn't read that page. Fill the fields manually.
AddWatchFlow.urlErrorMissingKey: URL import isn't configured. Add the watch from a photo, or enter the details manually.
AddWatchFlow.urlErrorInvalidUrl: That doesn't look like a valid link. Check it, or enter the details manually.
AddWatchFlow.urlErrorBlocked: This seller blocks automatic reading. Add the watch from a photo, or enter the details manually.
AddWatchFlow.urlErrorHttp: The page couldn't be read (HTTP {status}). Add the watch from a photo, or enter the details manually.
AddWatchFlow.urlErrorNoText: This page loads its content with JavaScript, so there's nothing to read. Add the watch from a photo, or enter the details manually.
AddWatchFlow.urlErrorTls: This site has a certificate problem we can't safely work around. Add the watch from a photo, or enter the details manually.
AddWatchFlow.urlErrorTimeout: That page took too long to respond. Add the watch from a photo, or enter the details manually.
AddWatchFlow.urlErrorNotWatch: That page doesn't look like a watch listing. Try another link, a photo, or manual entry.
AddWatchFlow.urlErrorGeneric: Couldn't reach that page. Add the watch from a photo, or enter the details manually.
AddWatchFlow.couldntReadPhoto: Couldn't read one of the photos — try a JPEG or PNG.
AddWatchFlow.specsExtracted: Specs extracted — review, adjust, and save.
AddWatchFlow.specsFromCatalog: Specs completed from our catalog — review, adjust, and save.
AddWatchFlow.specsFromWeb: Specs completed from the web — review, adjust, and save.
AddWatchFlow.noExtraSpecs: Couldn't find extra specs — fill in the rest yourself.
AddWatchFlow.doesntLookLikeWatch: That doesn't look like a watch.

CatalogSearch.noMatches: No matches — type your own specs below.
CatalogSearch.hint: Pick a known reference to pre-fill specs, or ignore this and type your own below.

ImageField.couldntReadImage: Couldn't read that image — try a JPEG or PNG.
ImageField.primaryHint: The first photo is shown on cards and your public profile.
ImageField.noStorageHint: Add R2 storage credentials to enable photo uploads — URL paste works meanwhile.
